guide.divine_beasts_excerpt: Vah Medoh, Vah Ruta, Vah Rudania, Vah Naboris — complete walkthrough routes and boss strategies.
guide.shrines_excerpt: Sorted by region, with detailed puzzle steps, treasure chest locations, and completion tips.
guide.master_sword_excerpt: You need 13 hearts to pull the Master Sword! Full location, prerequisites, and upgrade path.
guide.lynels_excerpt: Flurry Rush timing, parry tutorial, best weapon recommendations for farming powerful gear.
guide.koroks_excerpt: 15 puzzle types explained, Hestu's 3 locations, key seed distribution across 8 regions.
guide.towers_excerpt: All tower activation challenges, 15 stable locations, 4 Great Fairy Fountains, beginner route.
guide.cooking_best_excerpt: Attack boost, stealth, heat/cold resistance — all status recipes and ingredient locations.
guide.secrets_all_excerpt: Dragon locations, secret hot springs, Phantom Armor, Hylian Shield — hidden content you might miss.
guide.plateau_excerpt: From awakening to departure — four shrine puzzles, warm doublet, paraglider, beginner FAQ.
